description: A scan of two completed Kansas voter registration application forms stacked vertically, shown as a grayish document. Printed form fields and a citizenship-qualification section are visible, with a row of checkboxes and an I Swear or Affirm statement. Several entries and the signature lines are filled in by hand, and portions appear redacted with black bars. A yellow highlight marks part of the affirmation text.
notable_text: KANSAS VOTER REGISTRATION APPLICATION; Are you a citizen of the United States of America?; I am a citizen of the United States; I Swear or Affirm
